title: Idempotent resource discovery and deployment
context: Initial setup commands need to deploy internal tool resources (skills, schemas, templates) to a user project.
content: Use Path(__file__).parent.parent... to locate resources relative to the tool installation root. Employ shutil.copytree(src, dst, dirs_exist_ok=True) for idempotent deployment, allowing 'quorum init' to update framework resources without deleting user files or requiring manual cleanup.
anti_patterns: Avoided hardcoding absolute paths or assuming the current working directory contains tool source during execution.
